response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional technical proficiency across all required skills—TypeScript, React, Node.js, SQL, Docker, and AWS—they are significantly overqualified. Currently a Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq, their 15+ years of experience, staff-level roles, and open-source project leadership signal they would likely find this junior/mid-level IC role unstimulating and quickly outgrow it. The on-site presence requirement may also conflict with their recent location in Nigeria. Hiring risks (retention, boredom, compensation misalignment) outweigh technical fit.
strengths: Deep full-stack mastery: TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational databases across multiple production systems at scale
Strong software craftsmanship foundation evidenced by TDD adoption, CI/CD expertise, and mentoring through workshops and refactoring dojos
Bonus alignment: Kubernetes, AWS (CDK), and modern architecture patterns from recent roles at senior levels
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years seeking entry/mid-level IC role raises red flags for retention and career satisfaction
Location mismatch: Resume lists Lagos, Nigeria; role requires high on-site presence, likely Berlin-based given employer context
Compensation and autonomy mismatch: Staff engineers expect significantly higher pay and decision-making scope than this role structure appears to offer
